chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Crl. Misc. Application No.S-138 of 2024 (Shamshad Ali vs. SHO P.S KGM and others) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 29-08-2024 None present for the applicant. Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, Assistant Prosecutor General Sindh. = This Criminal Miscellaneous application is against order dated 29-04-2023 passed on application under section 22-A and B Cr.P.C by learned Additional Sessions Judge-I/M.C.T.C/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Mirpurkhas, in Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.585/ 2023, whereby learned Presiding Officer dismissed application of the applicant for registration of F.I.R against the respondents No.2 to 6. This matter was fixed on 01-06-2023 but nobody put his appearance on behalf of the applicant and again this matter was fixed on 07-08-2024 but position remained the same. In view of such a state of affairs, it is clear that applicant has lost his interest in the instant Criminal Miscellaneous application; hence same is hereby dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE *Saleem*
